2	Started: Mon 13 Apr 2026 05:04:13 AM EDT
3	PRD: Transform the SIGNAL terminal into a competitive financial intelligence platform: sync AI backfill to production, fix ticker recommendation pipeline, add dynamic column customization, integrate Polygon.io real-time market data, and build comprehensive company profiles with SEC EDGAR institutional/insider data.
4	Mode: Adversarial (loop)
5	---
6	
7	## Codebase Patterns
8	
9	- **mypy config**: `pyproject.toml` has `[tool.mypy] ignore_missing_imports = true` — needed because many deps lack stubs (boto3, firebase_admin, etc.)
10	- **database.py kwargs**: Use `dict[str, Any]` for engine kwargs to avoid mypy narrowing errors when mixing bool/int/type values
11	- **Script conventions**: Scripts in `scripts/` use `sys.path.insert(0, ...)` + `dotenv` load + `init_db(Config.DATABASE_URL)` + `get_session()` pattern
12	- **News.link is unique**: The `link` column is the unique identifier for articles across local and production DBs
13	
14	---

17	
18	- Created `scripts/export_ai_backfill.py` — exports AI fields as SQL UPDATE statements keyed on `link`
19	- Supports `--dry-run` (count + preview) and `--output <path>` (full SQL dump)
20	- SQL wraps in BEGIN/COMMIT, handles NULLs, booleans, float formatting, single-quote escaping
21	- Fixed `app/database.py` kwargs typing (dict[str, Any]) for mypy compatibility
22	- Added `[tool.mypy] ignore_missing_imports = true` to `pyproject.toml`
23	- Verified: 31,067 records exported, mypy clean, all PRD test assertions pass
24	- **Files changed:** `scripts/export_ai_backfill.py`, `app/database.py`, `pyproject.toml`
25	- **Environment notes for Tester:**
26	  - Local SQLite DB has 31,067 AI-analyzed articles — `--dry-run` will show this count
27	  - `--output` requires a writable path (e.g., `/tmp/ai_backfill.sql`)
28	  - mypy requires `pip install mypy` (not in requirements.txt by default)
29	  - 8 pre-existing test failures in `test_tiers.py`/`test_rate_limit.py` (stale tier config values) — not related to this story
30	---
31	
32	## 2026-04-13 09:12 EDT - US-001 - TESTER — TEST_PASSED
33	
34	- **All 5 test assertions passed**, all 5 acceptance criteria met
35	- Executed `--dry-run`: exits 0, prints "Found 31067 AI-analyzed articles to export" with 10-line preview
36	- Executed `--output`: exits 0, created 40MB SQL file (37744 lines, 31067 UPDATE statements)
37	- Verified SQL structure: BEGIN/COMMIT wrapping, all 9 AI fields in SET clauses, WHERE keyed on `link`
38	- Verified single-quote escaping (`''`), boolean formatting (TRUE/FALSE), float decimals
39	- mypy: "Success: no issues found in 1 source file"
40	- pytest: 86 passed, 8 failed (all 8 pre-existing in test_tiers.py/test_rate_limit.py — stale tier config values)
41	- Source DB has 0 NULL AI fields across 31067 records — NULL code path not exercised but SQL format is valid
42	- **Artifacts:** `ralph/test_results/US-001/attempt-1/` (dryrun_stdout.log, export_stdout.log, mypy_stdout.log, pytest_stdout.log, output/ai_backfill.sql)
43	---
44	
45	## 2026-04-13 09:17 EDT - US-002 - IMPLEMENTOR — Implemented import_ai_backfill.py
46	
47	- Created `scripts/import_ai_backfill.py` — imports AI backfill SQL dump into target DATABASE_URL
48	- Parses UPDATE statements via regex, converts SQL literals back to Python values
49	- Uses parameterized SQLAlchemy queries for execution (safe from SQL injection)
50	- Runs in a single transaction with full rollback on error

file.content:
# Ralph v2 Progress Log
Started: Mon 13 Apr 2026 05:04:13 AM EDT
PRD: Transform the SIGNAL terminal into a competitive financial intelligence platform: sync AI backfill to production, fix ticker recommendation pipeline, add dynamic column customization, integrate Polygon.io real-time market data, and build comprehensive company profiles with SEC EDGAR institutional/insider data.
Mode: Adversarial (loop)
---

## Codebase Patterns

- **mypy config**: `pyproject.toml` has `[tool.mypy] ignore_missing_imports = true` — needed because many deps lack stubs (boto3, firebase_admin, etc.)
- **database.py kwargs**: Use `dict[str, Any]` for engine kwargs to avoid mypy narrowing errors when mixing bool/int/type values
- **Script conventions**: Scripts in `scripts/` use `sys.path.insert(0, ...)` + `dotenv` load + `init_db(Config.DATABASE_URL)` + `get_session()` pattern
- **News.link is unique**: The `link` column is the unique identifier for articles across local and production DBs

---

## 2026-04-13 09:05 EDT - US-001 - IMPLEMENTOR — Implemented export_ai_backfill.py

- Created `scripts/export_ai_backfill.py` — exports AI fields as SQL UPDATE statements keyed on `link`
- Supports `--dry-run` (count + preview) and `--output <path>` (full SQL dump)
- SQL wraps in BEGIN/COMMIT, handles NULLs, booleans, float formatting, single-quote escaping
- Fixed `app/database.py` kwargs typing (dict[str, Any]) for mypy compatibility
- Added `[tool.mypy] ignore_missing_imports = true` to `pyproject.toml`
- Verified: 31,067 records exported, mypy clean, all PRD test assertions pass
- **Files changed:** `scripts/export_ai_backfill.py`, `app/database.py`, `pyproject.toml`
- **Environment notes for Tester:**
  - Local SQLite DB has 31,067 AI-analyzed articles — `--dry-run` will show this count
  - `--output` requires a writable path (e.g., `/tmp/ai_backfill.sql`)
  - mypy requires `pip install mypy` (not in requirements.txt by default)
  - 8 pre-existing test failures in `test_tiers.py`/`test_rate_limit.py` (stale tier config values) — not related to this story
---

## 2026-04-13 09:12 EDT - US-001 - TESTER — TEST_PASSED

- **All 5 test assertions passed**, all 5 acceptance criteria met
- Executed `--dry-run`: exits 0, prints "Found 31067 AI-analyzed articles to export" with 10-line preview
- Executed `--output`: exits 0, created 40MB SQL file (37744 lines, 31067 UPDATE statements)
- Verified SQL structure: BEGIN/COMMIT wrapping, all 9 AI fields in SET clauses, WHERE keyed on `link`
- Verified single-quote escaping (`''`), boolean formatting (TRUE/FALSE), float decimals
- mypy: "Success: no issues found in 1 source file"
- pytest: 86 passed, 8 failed (all 8 pre-existing in test_tiers.py/test_rate_limit.py — stale tier config values)
- Source DB has 0 NULL AI fields across 31067 records — NULL code path not exercised but SQL format is valid
- **Artifacts:** `ralph/test_results/US-001/attempt-1/` (dryrun_stdout.log, export_stdout.log, mypy_stdout.log, pytest_stdout.log, output/ai_backfill.sql)
---

## 2026-04-13 09:17 EDT - US-002 - IMPLEMENTOR — Implemented import_ai_backfill.py

- Created `scripts/import_ai_backfill.py` — imports AI backfill SQL dump into target DATABASE_URL
- Parses UPDATE statements via regex, converts SQL literals back to Python values
- Uses parameterized SQLAlchemy queries for execution (safe from SQL injection)
- Runs in a single transaction with full rollback on error

1051:## 2026-04-15 - US-021 - IMPLEMENTOR — Implemented Column Onboarding Overlay
1052-
1053-- Added first-visit column layout chooser for Max-tier users
1054-- **New JS functions** in `terminal-app.js`:
1055-  - `COLUMN_PRESETS` — 3 preset definitions (News Focus, Trading View, Full Terminal)
1056-  - `shouldShowOnboarding()` — guards: Max-tier only, no existing localStorage config, not already dismissed
1057-  - `applyColumnPreset(key)` — sets columnVisibility + columnOrder from preset, saves to localStorage, re-renders
1058-  - `showOnboarding()` — builds overlay DOM with 3 preset cards + "Customize later" skip link
1059-  - `dismissOnboarding()` — sets `instnews_onboarding_done` in localStorage, removes overlay
1060-- **Hook point**: `fetchTier()` calls `showOnboarding()` after confirming non-free tier (in the `else` branch of the upgrade gate)
1061-- **CSS**: New `.onboarding-*` classes in `terminal.css` — overlay, card, presets grid, column tag pills, responsive at 600px
1062-- **Preset column sets match AC exactly**:
1063-  - News Focus: Time, Source, Headline, Summary
1064-  - Trading View: Time, Sentiment, Ticker, Headline, Confidence, Risk Level
1065-  - Full Terminal: all 9 columns
1066-- **Self-validation**: `cd frontend && npx vite build` exits 0
1067-- **Files changed:** `frontend/src/terminal-app.js`, `frontend/src/styles/terminal.css`
1068-- **Environment notes for Tester:**
1069-  - Start backend: `python server.py`, frontend: `cd frontend && npm run dev`
1070-  - Test at `http://localhost:5173/terminal`
1071-  - To trigger onboarding: clear all localStorage (`localStorage.clear()`) or specifically remove `instnews_column_visibility`, `instnews_column_order`, `instnews_column_widths`, and `instnews_onboarding_done`
1072-  - Login with Max-tier test account (see playwrightTestConfig in prd.json)
1073-  - After login + tier fetch, onboarding overlay should appear
1074-  - For Pro-tier test: need a Pro-tier account or mock `/api/auth/tier` to return `{"tier": "pro"}`
1075-  - The overlay id is `#onboarding-overlay` — can check DOM presence
1076-  - Preset buttons have `data-preset="news|trading|full"` attributes
1077-  - After clicking a preset, verify columns via column settings panel (`#btn-col-settings`)
1078----

1056-  - `shouldShowOnboarding()` — guards: Max-tier only, no existing localStorage config, not already dismissed
1057-  - `applyColumnPreset(key)` — sets columnVisibility + columnOrder from preset, saves to localStorage, re-renders
1058-  - `showOnboarding()` — builds overlay DOM with 3 preset cards + "Customize later" skip link
1059-  - `dismissOnboarding()` — sets `instnews_onboarding_done` in localStorage, removes overlay
1060-- **Hook point**: `fetchTier()` calls `showOnboarding()` after confirming non-free tier (in the `else` branch of the upgrade gate)
1061-- **CSS**: New `.onboarding-*` classes in `terminal.css` — overlay, card, presets grid, column tag pills, responsive at 600px
